Website-Verifiable Checklist

Are published fees listed? ✗ Not Found
The form states a fee of $300 per course, but no specific tuition fees or fee schedules were found in the provided website content. The website only mentions 'Affordable Programs' and 'LaGuardia Foundation ACE Scholarships'.
https://www.laguardia.edu/ce/home/
Is the fee within caps ($350/course, $800/month)? ✓ Found
The stated form fee of $300 per course is within the government cap of $350 per course.
https://www.laguardia.edu/ce/home/
Is the program noncredit-bearing and skill-building/employment oriented? ✓ Found
The website confirms that LaGuardia's Adult and Continuing Education (ACE) programs are non-credit and focused on career skills, workforce training, and employment.
“Non-Credit Enrollment (FY 2025)”
https://www.laguardia.edu/about/
Is the program NOT at an OPWDD-certified location? ✓ Found
The program is located at LaGuardia Community College, which is a public community college campus under the City University of New York (CUNY), not an OPWDD-certified facility.
“Type: Public Community College, part of the City University of New York (CUNY)”
https://www.laguardia.edu/about/maps-and-directions/
